note: Mathlib/NumberTheory/Harmonic/Defs.lean:23 — def harmonic : ℕ → ℚ := fun n => ∑ i ∈ Finset.range n, (↑(i+1))⁻¹; docstring 'This file defines the harmonic numbers.'
verify_note: Confirmed in cache and source; def is literally the nth harmonic number as a sum of reciprocals, exact match for Q13407133 'harmonic number' (partial sum of the harmonic series).

note: Mathlib/LinearAlgebra/Matrix/Permanent.lean:32 — def permanent (M : Matrix n n R) : R := ∑ σ : Perm n, ∏ i, M (σ i) i; docstring 'This file defines the permanent of a matrix.'
